title: Specification Revision
description: Schema for a specification revision record — tracks changes to specification content through addenda, bulletins, RFI responses, and re-specifications.

revision_id.description: Unique identifier for this revision record.

document_ref.description: Reference to the specification document being revised.

changes_summary.description: Summary of what changed in this revision.

supersedes.description: ID of the record superseded by this revision.
